full_text:
Mi Zhu (Zizhong) 麋竺 (子仲)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Mi Zhu (麋竺), styledZizhong (子仲), was born in Qu County, Dong Hai Prefecture (presently Lian Yun Gang City in Jiang Su Province). It was he who financed Liu Bei in times of trouble, and he was treated extremely well in return. Mi Zhu was affiliated with Tao Qian, the Wei Kingdom, and the Shu Kingdom. Mi Zhu lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
